name: EWSB Bancorp, Inc. /MD/
business: EWSB Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland corporation that owns 100% of East Wisconsin Savings Bank, a Wisconsin-chartered stock savings bank. The company's business consists primarily of taking deposits from the general public and investing those deposits in loans, primarily one- to four-family residential real estate loans, marine and recreational vehicle loans, home equity loans and lines of credit, and other consumer loans. The company operates through its headquarters in Kaukauna and branches in Appleton, Freedom, and Kimberly, Wisconsin.
sellsTo: real estate investors for multifamily and commercial real estate

exposures.sentence: A failure or breach of our operational or security systems or infrastructure, including cyberattacks;
